name: GreenFlow Components Ltd.
summary: Registration complete, audited financials available, no negative public record in sample data.

evidence.title: Complete business registration
evidence.content: The supplier has active registration, stable ownership and complete tax profile.

evidence.title: No material negative media
evidence.content: No sanction, litigation, bribery or delivery failure signal found in mock media dataset.

name: Northbridge Packaging Co.
summary: Minor lawsuit and late delivery record require supplementary documents before onboarding.

evidence.title: Commercial lawsuit settled in 2025
evidence.content: A contract dispute lawsuit was settled with no ongoing enforcement, but procurement SOP requires explanation.

evidence.title: Two late delivery incidents
evidence.content: Two late delivery incidents were reported by reference customers during seasonal demand peaks.

name: Redstone Metals Trading
summary: Sanction proximity and bribery allegation create severe compliance risk.

evidence.title: Sanction proximity alert
evidence.content: A beneficial owner appears on a sectoral sanction watchlist in the mock screening dataset.

evidence.title: Bribery investigation allegation
evidence.content: Public reporting links a former sales executive to a bribery investigation involving customs clearance.
